base_radius_to_height.desc: 台基半径/总高（祈年殿典型约 18:34）

tier_count.desc: 台基/屋顶层级（默认三重）

aiInstruction: Radial ceremonial LlmPlan for Temple of Heaven. RECOMMENDED: MODULE + landmark:temple_of_heaven with params.baseRadius, tiers, facing. Compositional fallback: skeleton_type=RADIAL_RING, circular MASS or tiered ROOF/DOME, PAVING terrace rings. Output proportion_hints with tier_count and base_radius_to_height. symmetry=RADIAL. Do NOT use a plain rectangular box.
